rows.description: UK VAT reduced rate — domestic fuel, sanitary, children car seats
Austria VAT 13% — domestic flights, cut flowers
Denmark VAT standard (no reduced rates — flat 25%)
Romania VAT 5% — certain books, social housing
EU average — use country-specific where known
Canada GST 5% federal — HST 13-15% in ON/NS/NB/PEI/NL
Canada GST 0% — printed books, basic groceries (zero-rated)
United States — no federal VAT (sales tax is state-level, not collected at import)
Brazil ICMS — varies 17-25% by state, this is approximate weighted average
Australia GST 0% — basic food, health, education (GST-free)
Japan consumption tax 8% — food (excl. eat-in), newspapers
Malaysia Sales Tax — varies 5-10% by category; service tax 8%
Malaysia Sales Tax 5% — basic food, building materials
Vietnam VAT 8% — covid-era reduced rate extended through 2025
Indonesia PPN VAT standard (raised Apr-2022; further to 12% planned)
South Africa zero-rated — basic food, illuminating paraffin
Israel VAT (single rate; small reductions on tourism)
Switzerland VAT 2.6% — food, books, pharma, animals
Russia VAT 10% — food, children's goods, books, pharma
North Macedonia DDV 5% — food, books, pharma
Macao SAR — no general VAT (excise on specific goods only)
Antigua and Barbuda — ABST (sales tax) standard
St Kitts and Nevis VAT standard
St Kitts and Nevis VAT 10% — accommodation
St Vincent and the Grenadines VAT standard
New Caledonia TGC general rate (replaced TGI 2018)
Solomon Islands — Goods Tax standard (sales tax)
São Tomé and Príncipe IVA standard (from 2023)
Brazil ICMS standard (most-common state rate); IPI + PIS + COFINS apply separately
Brazil ICMS reduced (basic food / construction inputs in some states)
Canada federal GST standard; provincial HST/PST stack on top per province
Canada GST/HST zero-rated (basic groceries, prescription drugs, exports)
Indonesia PPN (VAT) standard — increased to 11% April 2022, scheduled to 12% from 2025
Indonesia PPN 0% — exports + certain basic goods
Malaysia SST (Sales Tax) standard rate; service tax 6%/8% separate. GST repealed 2018.
United States — no federal VAT; state sales taxes apply via us-sales-tax.seed.ts
Andorra IGI 9.5% — special rate (banking, financial services)
Monaco TVA — applies French rate (Monaco in FR fiscal territory)
San Marino — monophase tax (Imposta Monofase) replaces VAT; 17% on most imports; effective rate varies
Vatican City — no national VAT; rides Italian customs for commercial flows
Liechtenstein MWST — Swiss customs union, mirrors Swiss VAT rate
Liechtenstein MWST 2.6% — food, books, medicines (mirrors CH)
Gibraltar — no VAT; uses Import Duty regime instead
Greenland — no general VAT; duty + import surcharge from first DKK
Republic of the Congo TVA standard (CEMAC rate)
South Sudan VAT standard (limited published guidance)
Iraq — no VAT; sales tax (10% mobile, 15% petrol) + reconstruction tax 5% on imports
Yemen general sales tax standard (administration disrupted)
Syria — no general VAT; consumption tax on specific categories
Libya — no VAT; selective consumption taxes apply
Puerto Rico IVU (sales + use tax) standard — municipal 1% + commonwealth 10.5%
Kiribati — no VAT/GST; import duty regime
Federated States of Micronesia — no general VAT; state import taxes vary
Marshall Islands — no VAT; import duty regime
Nauru — no VAT; duty + excise on imports
Tuvalu — no VAT; small-state customs regime
Maldives TGST (tourism goods + services tax) tourism rate; GGST 8% general
Timor-Leste sales tax standard (2.5% on imports)
Cuba — no general VAT for foreign-trade purposes; sales tax 10% on retail. US sanctions block most commercial flows.
